# Page Title: Security Section | IIT Jammu

### Links

- Instructions to the Visitors to IIT Jammu
- Campus Security Instructions
- Security Instruction for Students of IIT Jammu
- Security Staff

- Speed Limit inside the campus area – 20 KMPH.
- **Wearing of Helmet** – Entry and movement of 2-wheelers on the campus with a helmet for both RIDER and PILLION.
- **Wearing of Seat Belts**– Seat belts are compulsory for both driver and co-driver – for entry and movement of vehicles (four-wheelers) on campus.
- All vehicle users are advised to park their vehicles inside the institute at designated parking spaces/slots.
- Do not leave personal belongings unattended. It just takes a moment to take care of and lock your personal belongings.
- Report suspicious persons to the security control room.
- Any item found on the campus can be handed over to the nearest Security post/staff or at the main gate. The security section will keep the same safe for handing over to the rightful owner.
- IIT Jam

# Page Title: Security Section | IIT Jammu

### Emergency Situations/Incidents/Accidents

In case of any emergency, the person affected or onlooker should inform any security
Staff

- Security Control Room on 0638 / 0191-257 0638
- Emergency Response Team (ERT) on 1111 (0191 – 257 1111)

## About Us

- Security forms the basis of any organisation’s functioning and growth. A Safe and Secure environment is essential for any Education Institute to flourish. The Institute of the stature of IIT Jammu requires special and defined security procedures.
- IIT Jammu has a robust, well-defined, and reliable security setup. A qualified and experienced security officer heads the security section – fully and truly committed to the security duties of the Institute to make the IIT Jammu a safe and secure place.
- The Security Section of the Institute comprises the professional and trained manpower to manage the security setup of IIT Jammu. The security section of the Institute is guided and regulated

# Page Title: Security Section | IIT Jammu

### Links

- Instructions to the Visitors to IIT Jammu
- Campus Security Instructions
- Security Instruction for Students of IIT Jammu
- Security Staff

- All the visitors to IIT Jammu are advised to note and follow the following
points,
- Entry to campus will be with a valid photo ID card (hard copy) or soft copy only
in the Digi locker app.
- Strictly no entry for anyone - possessing / under the influence of Liquor or
other intoxicating items.
- Any weapon or sharp object will not be permitted inside the campus under any
circumstance. Weapons of the security team/protection team of the Chief Guest /
Artist / Guest will not be permitted inside the Institute.
- Visitors may be subject to physical frisking/ checking by a metal detector and
Breathalyzer.
- The right of entry to the Institute is reserved.
- Visitors' vehicles are not permitted inside the campus.

# Page Title: Security Section | IIT Jammu

### Links

- Instructions to the Visitors to IIT Jammu
- Campus Security Instructions
- Security Instruction for Students of IIT Jammu
- Security Staff

- The students must remain self-disciplined and follow basic principles of
community living.
- Students will enter the main camps from the main gate only and must carry the
Institute ID card at any time while moving out of the campus.
- All students must follow the instructions of the security staff in the hostel
area and campus while moving in/out of the main gate.
- Students should not indulge in any act of damage to the property of any other
individual or the Institute.
- **IIT Jammu is a no-ragging zone.** The management has **Zero
Tolerance** for any ragging-related issues if observed or reported.
